text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus declares her intent to seize victory
with all her might, and Hishi Akebono etches
those words into her heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two issue spirited challenges to one another,
and the Takamatsunomiya Kinen starts with a
bang!
